title: Changelog entry frontmatter
description: Schema for the frontmatter of a per-session changelog entry at engine/changelog/<YYYY>/<S-NNNN>-<slug>.md. The body content is bounded to 50 lines (soft) / 70 lines (hard) including frontmatter. Ported from the Engine reference template per ADR 0092.

material_change_class.description: Primary classification of the material change recorded by this entry.

module.description: Module whose surface was most affected; 'multi' if cross-module.

summary.description: Optional one-line summary; full narrative in body (max 50 lines total).
